白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物后侧45°视角的全身图。

# 生成双马尾角色时，建议关闭后视图、后侧45度视图的右视图参考开关
# When creating a twin-tail character, it is recommended to turn off the right view reference switch here.

## 这里这三个（同列）开关，必须保持一样的开关状态。都是控制是否启用换脸的开关，如果实在无法得到一张满意的脸部特写时，可以关掉这里的开关试试。
## These three switches (in the same column) must all be in the same state. They control whether face swapping is enabled. If you still can't get a satisfactory close-up of a face, try turning these switches off.
这里这个红色开关是控制切换：输入图\人物全身正视图参生成人物上半身正视图的。开启状态为使用正视图参考生成人物全身正视图。

# 开启状态为使用宽肩骨骼图；关闭为使用窄肩骨骼图
## 注意：真人建议使用宽肩骨骼图，动漫人物建议用窄肩骨骼图
# When enabled, the wide-shoulder pose image is used; when disabled, the narrow-shoulder pose image is used.
## Note: For real-life figures, images with broad shoulders are recommended; for anime characters, images with narrow shoulders are recommended.
白色背景。生成图中角色全身的正视图。
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：角色的正视图。

# 这俩个开关状态要保持一致。
# The states of these two switches must be consistent.

# 开启状态为使用宽肩骨骼图；关闭为使用窄肩骨骼图
# 注意：写实风格建议使用宽肩骨骼图，动漫人物建议用窄肩骨骼图
# When enabled, the wide-shoulder pose image is used; when disabled, the narrow-shoulder pose image is used.
## Note: Note: For realistic styles, wide-shouldered poses are recommended; for anime characters, narrow-shouldered poses are recommended.

# 这里的脸部图并非一定要使用的。建议只在“脸部特写”生成效果不佳时尝试输入一张脸部图。平时不使用时，这里随便输入一张图片当做占位符并且将这里的红色切换节点切换为“false”状态即可
# It is not mandatory to use a face picture here. It is recommended to try to enter a face image only when the "Face Close-up" generation is not good. When not in use, just enter an image as a placeholder and switch the red toggle node here to "false"

This red switch controls whether to use the "Input Image" or "Full-body Front View of a Person" reference to generate a front view of the upper body of a person. When enabled, it uses the front view reference to generate a full-body front view of a person.

# 这俩个开关状态要保持一致。
# The states of these two switches must be consistent.

# 切换脸部参考或输入图参考。 开关“true”状态为“脸部图参考”;开关“false”状态为“输入图参考”
# Switch between face reference and input image reference. "true" for "face reference"; "false" for "input image reference".

# 此处开关仅控制人物全身正45度、全身左视图、全身右视图的参考。
# This switch only controls the reference for the full-body 45-degree angle, the left full-body view, and the right full-body view.
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物面朝右方的侧视图，

# 开启可增强脸部一致性「注意：这里的脸部一致性是基于生成的脸部特写，而不是输入图」
# Enabling this feature enhances facial consistency. [Note: Facial consistency here is based on the generated close-up of the face, not the input image.]
白色背景。生成图中人物脸部正面近照。
白色背景。生成图中角色头部正面近照。

当输入图中角色不露脸时（如戴着头盔），建议将此处的这个开关切换为“false”状态
When the character in the input image is not showing their face (wearing a helmet), it is recommended to switch this switch to "false".
